display.purpose: Homepage hero and major brand statements only.

headline.purpose: Page h1 and major content headings.

body.purpose: Docs, explanatory copy, and labels that need to read quickly.

label.purpose: Commands, metadata, breadcrumbs, charts, and code-adjacent UI.

script.purpose: Rare playful marks and small status badges.

shadows.name: panel-lift
shadows.purpose: Main page sheets and large brand panels.

motion.name: state-fast
motion.purpose: Button, link, and color state transitions.

motion.name: footer-story
motion.purpose: Large footer illustration reveal, disabled for reduced motion.

components.name: Primary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; border:1.5px solid var(--primary, #e88783); border-radius:999px; background:var(--primary, #e88783); color:var(--ink, #2f2a44); padding:12px 26px; font-family:var(--font-sans, Nunito, sans-serif); font-size:17px; font-weight:700; line-height:1; text-decoration:none; box-shadow:0 6px 16px rgba(196,96,92,.22); transition:background .15s ease,border-color .15s ease,transform .15s ease,box-shadow .15s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { transform:translateY(-1px); background:color-mix(in srgb, var(--primary, #e88783) 92%, var(--ink, #2f2a44)); border-color:color-mix(in srgb, var(--primary, #e88783) 92%, var(--ink, #2f2a44)); box-shadow:0 8px 20px rgba(196,96,92,.28); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline:2px solid var(--primary, #e88783); outline-offset:2px; }

components.name: Feature Chip
components.description: Category filter pill used on feature lists.
components.css: .ds-feature-chip { font-family:"IBM Plex Mono", ui-monospace, monospace; font-size:13px; padding:7px 14px; border-radius:999px; border:1.5px solid rgba(155,196,182,.4); background:transparent; color:rgba(47,42,68,.72); white-space:nowrap; cursor:pointer; transition:border-color .25s ease,background .25s ease,transform .2s ease,box-shadow .25s ease; } .ds-feature-chip:hover { transform:translateY(-1px); border-color:rgba(155,196,182,.55); box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(47,42,68,.1); } .ds-feature-chip:focus-visible { outline:2px solid var(--primary, #e88783); outline-offset:2px; } .ds-feature-chip[aria-pressed="true"] { transform:translateY(-1px); border-color:rgba(155,196,182,.55); background:rgba(155,196,182,.18); box-shadow:0 3px 10px rgba(47,42,68,.15); }

components.name: Docs Sheet
components.description: Primary documentation container with soft panel lift.
components.html:
Quickstart

Install the CLI, start local HTTPS development, and deploy.
components.css: .ds-docs-sheet { border:2px solid var(--line, rgba(47,42,68,.16)); border-radius:var(--panel-radius, 30px); background:var(--panel, #f5f0e8); color:var(--muted, rgba(47,42,68,.74)); box-shadow:0 18px 45px rgba(47,42,68,.1); padding:clamp(18px, 4vw, 36px); font-family:var(--font-sans, Nunito, sans-serif); line-height:1.55; } .ds-docs-sheet h1 { margin:0 0 12px; padding-bottom:8px; border-bottom:2px solid var(--line, rgba(47,42,68,.16)); color:var(--ink, #2f2a44); font-family:var(--font-heading, Poppins, sans-serif); font-size:clamp(28px, 4.2vw, 36px); line-height:1.2; } .ds-docs-sheet p { margin:0; max-width:70ch; }

components.name: Command Card
components.description: Install command block with mint caption chrome and copy action.
components.html:
install with one command
$curl -fsSL https://tako.sh/install.sh | sh
components.css: .ds-command-card { max-width:640px; border:2px solid rgba(47,42,68,.2); border-radius:18px; background:var(--paper, #faf7ef); overflow:hidden; color:var(--ink, #2f2a44); } .ds-command-head { background:rgba(155,196,182,.3); border-bottom:1.5px solid rgba(47,42,68,.1); padding:7px 14px; font-family:"IBM Plex Mono", ui-monospace, monospace; font-size:11px; letter-spacing:.08em; color:rgba(47,42,68,.6); } .ds-command-body { display:flex; gap:10px; align-items:center; overflow-x:auto; padding:14px 16px; font-family:"IBM Plex Mono", ui-monospace, monospace; font-size:clamp(14px, 2.1vw, 18px); white-space:nowrap; } .ds-command-body span { color:var(--primary-text, #c4605c); } .ds-command-body code { color:var(--ink, #2f2a44); background:transparent; padding:0; }

components.name: Inline Copy Button
components.description: Compact copy action for command and code surfaces.
components.html: <button class="ds-copy-button" type="button" aria-label="Copy"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" aria-hidden="true"><rect x="9" y="9" width="13" height="13" rx="2" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"></rect><path d="M5 15H4a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V4a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h9a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v1" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"></path></svg></button>
components.css: .ds-copy-button { position:relative; display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; width:32px; height:32px; border:1.5px solid rgba(47,42,68,.34); border-radius:8px; background:var(--panel-glass, rgba(250,247,239,.78)); color:rgba(47,42,68,.82); box-shadow:0 2px 10px rgba(47,42,68,.1); cursor:pointer; transition:transform .14s ease,border-color .14s ease,color .14s ease,background-color .14s ease; } .ds-copy-button svg { width:15px; height:15px; } .ds-copy-button:hover { transform:translateY(-1px); border-color:rgba(232,135,131,.68); color:var(--primary-text, #c4605c); background:var(--panel-strong, #f7f1ea); } .ds-copy-button:focus-visible { outline:2px solid var(--primary, #e88783); outline-offset:2px; }

components.name: Chart Panel
components.description: Performance evidence card with mono labels and ink grid treatment.
components.css: .ds-chart-panel { margin:0; border:1.5px solid rgba(47,42,68,.15); border-radius:8px; background:var(--panel-strong, #f7f1ea); color:var(--muted, rgba(47,42,68,.74)); padding:20px; font-family:var(--font-sans, Nunito, sans-serif); } .ds-chart-eyebrow { margin:0; font-family:"IBM Plex Mono", ui-monospace, monospace; font-size:12px; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:.08em; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--primary-text, #c4605c); } .ds-chart-panel h3 { margin:6px 0 0; color:var(--ink, #2f2a44); font-family:var(--font-heading, Poppins, sans-serif); font-size:22px; line-height:1.14; } .ds-chart-panel p:not(.ds-chart-eyebrow) { margin:8px 0 0; line-height:1.42; }

narrative.overview: Tako's visual system should feel like a hands-on workbench for self-hosted software: warm enough to invite a first deploy, structured enough to trust with production, and specific enough that it cannot be mistaken for a generic cloud tool. The brand is not trying to look like a dark terminal or a corporate deployment dashboard.
keyCharacteristics: Warm neutral canvas with coral, mint, and gold accents.
Rounded tactile panels, not floating enterprise dashboards.
Poppins headings, Nunito body, IBM Plex Mono for commands and metadata, Caveat for rare handwritten emphasis.
Copy that is short, direct, and grounded in real actions.
Motion used as feedback and memory, with reduced-motion fallbacks.

rules.name: The Coral Earns It Rule
rules.body: Coral marks actions, active states, and specific proof. Do not wash the page in coral just to make it feel branded.

rules.name: The Mint Helps Rule
rules.body: Mint is for assistance and structure: success, sidebar hover, command chrome, and diagrams. It should not compete with the primary CTA.

rules.name: The Mono Has a Job Rule
rules.body: Use IBM Plex Mono for code, commands, charts, and metadata. Do not use it as a generic developer costume.

rules.name: The Border Carries Structure Rule
rules.body: Use borders and tonal surfaces first. Add shadows only when an element needs actual lift or state feedback.

dos: Do preserve the existing coral, mint, gold, ink, and warm neutral palette unless the user explicitly asks for a redesign.
Do make install and deploy actions easy to find, especially on the homepage and quickstart path.
Do use public data, raw links, and method notes when making performance claims.
Do keep docs controls keyboard-accessible, visible on focus, and readable on mobile.
Do use playful details sparingly: one "Takosophy" or badge-level moment is enough.
donts: Don't use generic SaaS landing-page gloss: vague productivity copy, glassy blue-purple gradients, or anonymous dashboard mockups.
Don't use a terminal-only tech aesthetic. Commands matter, but the whole site should not become a black console.
Don't make benchmark bravado without public data. Tie claims to reports, methodology, or exact measurements.
Don't put dashboard chrome on brand pages. Marketing and docs need reading paths, not app-shell furniture.
Don't add new colored side-stripe callouts. Use full borders, tinted backgrounds, icons, or inline emphasis instead.
Don't repeat tiny uppercase eyebrows above every section. Use labels only when they add orientation.
